name: Daily Sun Collector
condition: Collect {parameter} units of sun during one day

name: Chapter Hunter
condition: Defeat 50 zombies from {chapter}

name: Professional Plant Killer
condition: Kill 10 zombies using only plants

name: Only Cactus
condition: Kill 10 zombies using only {plant}

name: Economical Plant Eater
condition: Win a level without losing more than {parameter} plants

name: Defense Master
condition: Finish a level with exactly {parameter} sun remaining

name: Quick Action
condition: Kill 10 zombies in less than {parameter} seconds after the first wave starts

name: Professional Destroyer
condition: Use exactly 3 explosive plants in one level

name: Symmetry
condition: Finish a level with a garden symmetrical across the middle row

name: Family Massacre
condition: Use only plants from the {family} family to kill zombies

name: Blooming Under Restrictions
condition: Win without using a plant from the {family} family

name: Night or Morning
condition: Complete a daytime level using only night plants or mushrooms

name: Win Streak
condition: Win 5 consecutive levels at difficulty 5

name: Almost Victory
condition: Kill 10 zombies in column 1 of a row whose lawn mower is gone

name: OCD Challenge
condition: Win a level where the garden has no symmetry except the middle row

name: Cloudy Day
condition: Complete a level after planting exactly {parameter} plants and only sun-producing plants

name: One Less Column
condition: Win without planting anything in column {column}

name: Defenseless Row
condition: Win without planting anything in row {row}

name: Defenseless Cross
condition: Win while leaving row {row} and column {column} empty

name: Lawn Mowing Time
condition: Kill at least {parameter} zombies using lawn mowers
